trusted-services.info: Trusted Services are web services that are allowed to interact with Sunce wallet by requesting account data or proposing transactions. You can add a new service once it tries to interact with Sunce.

confirm.title: Confirm removal
confirm.text: The service will be removed from your trust list. Are you sure?

validation.duplicate: This server is already in the list.

info.note: The first server in the list is the primary one. The others remain available as alternatives.
info.primary: Sunce connects to Horizon API servers to retrieve the current account state and to submit transactions to the blockchain.
info.secondary: By default Sunce uses Stellar's public Horizon server. It can be slow at times, so here you can add alternatives, for example a paid node.

status.problem-without-message: The server did not pass the check.
